name: Chat Message
description: Single message bubble for user or AI responses. Supports markdown rendering, code blocks, attachments, reactions, and edit mode.

user.description: Right-aligned message bubble with primary-tinted background for user messages

slots.content: Message content with full markdown rendering
slots.actions: Copy, edit, delete action buttons on hover

assistant.description: Left-aligned message bubble with surface background and avatar for AI responses

slots.content: Message content with full markdown rendering
slots.actions: Copy, react, branch action buttons on hover

system.description: Centered system message with muted styling for status updates

slots.content: Full markdown rendering with code blocks, images, links
slots.actions: Copy, edit, delete, react, branch buttons

visual_brief: Message bubble layout with avatar on the left (user messages) or a model icon (assistant messages). Sender name in small bold text with a relative timestamp to the right. Content area supports full markdown: paragraphs, headings, bold/italic, bulleted lists, code blocks with syntax highlighting and copy button, inline code, images, and links. Action buttons (copy, edit, delete, react, branch) appear on hover in a small row above or below the message. User messages align left with a subtle surface background. Assistant messages use a slightly different surface shade. System messages are centered with muted italic text.

responsive.mobile: Avatar size reduces to 28px. Action buttons appear on long-press instead of hover. Code blocks scroll horizontally. Message content takes full width minus avatar.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with 32px avatars. Actions appear on hover/tap.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with 36px avatars, hover actions, and generous content width for code blocks.

composition.ChatMessage: Row(d-surface, align: role) > [Avatar? + MessageBody + Timestamp?(mono-data, text-xs)]
composition.MessageBody: Bubble(d-surface, variant: role) > [SenderName?(font-bold, text-sm) + Content(markdown) + CodeBlock?(syntax-highlight, copy-button)]
